title.en: EHT PPDU Formats in Full: MU vs TB, EHT-STF/LTF, Data & Packet Extension
title.zh: EHT PPDU 格式全解：MU 与 TB 帧、EHT-STF/LTF、数据字段与包扩展

blocks.en: A Wi-Fi 7 transmission is not just 'a blob of data on the air' — it is a precisely ordered run of fields called a PPDU (PHY Protocol Data Unit). Earlier lessons opened the two signalling fields, U-SIG and EHT-SIG. This lesson walks the whole packet from front to back and answers a different question: what are the *formats* an EHT PPDU can take, and what physically sits between the signalling and the actual payload? 802.11be defines exactly two EHT PPDU formats — and which one you are looking at changes both the field list and what each field is for.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 的一次发送，并不是空口上“一坨数据”那么简单——它是一串顺序严格排列的字段，统称为 PPDU（PHY 协议数据单元）。之前的课讲过两个信令字段 U-SIG 与 EHT-SIG。本课则从头到尾走一遍整个数据包，回答一个不同的问题：EHT PPDU 究竟有哪些“格式”？在信令和真正的载荷之间，物理上又夹着什么？802.11be 恰好定义了两种 EHT PPDU 格式——你看到的是哪一种，会同时改变字段清单以及每个字段的用途。

blocks.en: The two formats are the EHT MU PPDU and the EHT TB PPDU. The MU PPDU is the all-purpose downlink/standalone format: an AP uses it to talk to one or more users, and it is NOT a reply to a trigger, so it must describe itself completely — that is why it always carries the EHT-SIG field with the per-user RU and rate map. The TB PPDU is the trigger-based uplink format: a station sends it as a synchronized response to a Trigger frame, which has already told everyone their RU and rate. Because that schedule is already known, the TB PPDU drops EHT-SIG entirely. Think of MU as 'self-describing' and TB as 'described by the Trigger'.
blocks.zh: 这两种格式是 EHT MU PPDU 和 EHT TB PPDU。MU PPDU 是“万能”的下行/独立格式：AP 用它和一个或多个用户通信，而且它不是对触发帧的回应，所以必须把自己完整地描述清楚——这正是它总要携带 EHT-SIG 字段（其中含每用户的 RU 与速率分配图）的原因。TB PPDU 则是“基于触发（trigger-based）”的上行格式：站点把它作为对 Trigger 帧的同步响应发出，而 Trigger 帧此前已经告知了每个人各自的 RU 和速率。正因为这套调度已知，TB PPDU 干脆完全去掉了 EHT-SIG。可以把 MU 理解为“自描述”，把 TB 理解为“由 Trigger 描述”。

Legacy + U-SIG = pre-EHT modulated; EHT-STF onward = EHT modulated.</text></svg>

caption.en: The two EHT PPDU formats share the legacy preamble, U-SIG, EHT-STF, EHT-LTF, Data and PE. The MU PPDU adds EHT-SIG (the self-description); the TB PPDU omits it and instead doubles the EHT-STF.
caption.zh: 两种 EHT PPDU 格式共享传统前导码、U-SIG、EHT-STF、EHT-LTF、Data 和 PE。MU PPDU 额外携带 EHT-SIG（即自描述部分）；TB PPDU 省去它，转而把 EHT-STF 时长加倍。

blocks.en: The standard groups the fields into two families, and the boundary matters. L-STF, L-LTF, L-SIG, RL-SIG, U-SIG (and EHT-SIG, in the MU case) are the 'pre-EHT modulated fields'. Everything after — EHT-STF, EHT-LTF, Data and PE — are the 'EHT modulated fields'. The pre-EHT fields are designed so that a device with bandwidth larger than 80 MHz only has to process one 80 MHz subblock to recover all of its own assignment information; it never needs to decode the other 80 MHz subblocks. The EHT modulated fields then carry the actual MIMO training and payload.
blocks.zh: 标准把这些字段分成两大家族，而这条分界线很重要。L-STF、L-LTF、L-SIG、RL-SIG、U-SIG（在 MU 情形下还包括 EHT-SIG）被称为“pre-EHT 调制字段”；其后的一切——EHT-STF、EHT-LTF、Data 和 PE——则是“EHT 调制字段”。pre-EHT 字段的设计使得：带宽大于 80 MHz 的设备只需处理其中一个 80 MHz 子块，就能取回属于自己的全部分配信息，而无需解码其他 80 MHz 子块。随后的 EHT 调制字段才真正承载 MIMO 训练序列与载荷。

blocks.en: Next come the two EHT training fields, and they do different jobs. The EHT-STF (Short Training field) exists to refine automatic gain control (AGC) for a MIMO transmission — it lets the receiver set its amplifier gain correctly before the fine work begins. The EHT-LTF (Long Training field) is what the receiver actually uses to estimate the MIMO channel between every transmit stream and every receive chain; an EHT PPDU may carry several EHT-LTF symbols, with more streams needing more symbols. Here is where the TB format's tweak pays off: in a TB PPDU many stations transmit at once, so the EHT-STF is doubled in duration to give the AP enough signal to lock its gain across all those simultaneous uplinks.
blocks.zh: 接下来是两个 EHT 训练字段，它们各司其职。EHT-STF（短训练字段）用于在 MIMO 传输中精调自动增益控制（AGC）——它让接收机在精细处理开始之前先把放大器增益设置正确。EHT-LTF（长训练字段）才是接收机真正用来估计 MIMO 信道的字段，即估计每条发送流与每条接收链之间的信道；一个 EHT PPDU 可携带若干个 EHT-LTF 符号，流越多需要的符号越多。TB 格式的那点改动正是在这里见效：在 TB PPDU 中有许多站点同时发送，因此 EHT-STF 时长被加倍，好让 AP 有足够的信号在所有这些同时到达的上行信号上锁定增益。

blocks.en: A clean way to remember the split: the legacy fields and U-SIG say 'who/how to decode' (signalling), the EHT-STF/LTF say 'tune your radio and learn the channel' (training), and the Data + PE say 'here is the payload, and here is a little extra time to finish processing it' (payload). Three jobs, in that order, every EHT packet.
blocks.zh: 一个清晰的记忆方法：传统字段与 U-SIG 负责说“谁、怎么解码”（信令）；EHT-STF/LTF 负责说“调好你的射频、学好信道”（训练）；Data 加 PE 负责说“这是载荷，外加一点点时间把它处理完”（载荷）。每个 EHT 数据包，都是这三件事，按这个顺序来。

blocks.en: Finally the payload and its tail. The Data field carries the PSDU(s) — the MAC-layer frames — wrapped with a SERVICE field at the front and scrambled by a length-2047 PPDU-synchronous scrambler so the bit stream has no long runs of identical symbols. After the Data field comes the Packet Extension (PE): a field of duration 0, 4, 8, 12, 16 or 20 microseconds whose only purpose is to give the receiver extra processing time at the end of the packet (a 20 µs PE is mandatory for cases like 4096-QAM or very large RUs). Its content is arbitrary, but it is transmitted at the same average power and roughly the same spectrum as the Data field, so it does not leak energy outside the occupied RUs.
blocks.zh: 最后是载荷及其“收尾”。Data 字段承载 PSDU（即 MAC 层帧），前面包上一个 SERVICE 字段，并由一个长度为 2047 的“PPDU 同步扰码器”加扰，使比特流中不会出现一长串相同的符号。Data 字段之后是包扩展（Packet Extension，PE）：一个时长为 0、4、8、12、16 或 20 微秒的字段，其唯一目的就是在数据包末尾给接收机额外的处理时间（在 4096-QAM 或超大 RU 等情形下，20 µs 的 PE 是强制的）。它的内容是任意的，但以与 Data 字段相同的平均功率、大致相同的频谱发送，从而不会把能量泄漏到已占用 RU 之外。

blocks.en:
graph TD A[Trigger frame from AP?] -->|No / downlink| B[EHT MU PPDU] A -->|Yes, synchronized UL| C[EHT TB PPDU] B --> D[Carries EHT-SIG:
self-describes RU + per-user MCS/NSS] C --> E[No EHT-SIG;
EHT-STF doubled for UL combining] D --> F[EHT-STF AGC -> EHT-LTF channel est.] E --> F F --> G[Data field: SERVICE + PSDU, scrambled] G --> H[Packet Extension 0..20 us:
extra RX processing time]
blocks.zh:
graph TD A[是否为 AP 发来的 Trigger 帧?] -->|否 / 下行| B[EHT MU PPDU] A -->|是, 同步上行| C[EHT TB PPDU] B --> D[携带 EHT-SIG:
自描述 RU + 每用户 MCS/NSS] C --> E[无 EHT-SIG;
EHT-STF 加倍以合并上行] D --> F[EHT-STF 调 AGC -> EHT-LTF 估信道] E --> F F --> G[Data 字段: SERVICE + PSDU, 加扰] G --> H[包扩展 PE 0..20 us:
额外接收处理时间]

summary.en: Field-by-field: the format definitions and the EHT modulated fields
summary.zh: 逐字段精读：格式定义与 EHT 调制字段

blocks.en: Clause 36.3.4 states that two EHT PPDU formats are defined — EHT MU PPDU (Figure 36-17, transmission to one or more users, not a response to a triggering frame, EHT-SIG present) and EHT TB PPDU (Figure 36-18, a response to a triggering frame from an AP, EHT-SIG absent, EHT-STF duration twice that of the MU PPDU). Table 36-17 lists the fields; RL-SIG, U-SIG, EHT-STF, EHT-LTF and PE are present in both formats. L-STF/L-LTF/L-SIG/RL-SIG/U-SIG/EHT-SIG are the pre-EHT modulated fields; EHT-STF/EHT-LTF/Data/PE are the EHT modulated fields. Clause 36.3.12.9 (EHT-STF) gives its purpose as improving AGC estimation in a MIMO transmission, positions it immediately after EHT-SIG (MU) or U-SIG (TB), and defines its duration as periodicity 0.8 us with 5 periods for the MU PPDU (doubled for TB). Clause 36.3.12.10 (EHT-LTF) provides MIMO channel estimation between constellation-mapper outputs and receive chains; EHT-LTF symbols are multiplied by entries of a mapping matrix P, with single-stream pilots used for all spatial-multiplexing modes except 1x EHT-LTF, and the number of EHT-LTFs grows with the total spatial streams (Table 36-43). Clause 36.3.13 (Data field) carries the PSDU(s) preceded by the SERVICE field (Scrambler Initialization B0-B10 set to 0, B11-B15 reserved) and scrambled by a length-2047 PPDU-synchronous scrambler with generator S(x)=x^11+x^9+1. Clause 36.3.14 (Packet extension) allows PE durations of 0/4/8/12/16/20 us; 20 us is required for an EHT MU PPDU with 4096-QAM, a 320 MHz MU PPDU with an RU/MRU larger than 2x996, or any EHT TB PPDU. The PE provides additional receive processing time and is sent at the same average power as the Data field with commensurate spectrum.
blocks.zh: 36.3.4 节规定定义了两种 EHT PPDU 格式——EHT MU PPDU（图 36-17，面向一个或多个用户发送，不是对触发帧的响应，存在 EHT-SIG）与 EHT TB PPDU（图 36-18，对 AP 触发帧的响应，无 EHT-SIG，且 EHT-STF 时长为 MU PPDU 的两倍）。表 36-17 列出各字段；RL-SIG、U-SIG、EHT-STF、EHT-LTF、PE 在两种格式中都存在。L-STF/L-LTF/L-SIG/RL-SIG/U-SIG/EHT-SIG 是 pre-EHT 调制字段；EHT-STF/EHT-LTF/Data/PE 是 EHT 调制字段。36.3.12.9 节（EHT-STF）说明其目的是在 MIMO 传输中改善 AGC 估计，并将其置于 EHT-SIG 之后（MU）或 U-SIG 之后（TB），其 MU PPDU 时长定义为周期 0.8 us、共 5 个周期（TB 加倍）。36.3.12.10 节（EHT-LTF）提供星座映射器输出与接收链之间的 MIMO 信道估计；EHT-LTF 符号乘以映射矩阵 P 的元素，除 1x EHT-LTF 外的所有空间复用模式都使用单流导频，EHT-LTF 的数量随总空间流数增长（表 36-43）。36.3.13 节（Data 字段）承载 PSDU，前置 SERVICE 字段（扰码初始化 B0-B10 置 0，B11-B15 保留），并由生成多项式 S(x)=x^11+x^9+1 的长度 2047 PPDU 同步扰码器加扰。36.3.14 节（包扩展）允许 PE 时长为 0/4/8/12/16/20 us；在 4096-QAM 的 EHT MU PPDU、含大于 2x996 的 RU/MRU 的 320 MHz MU PPDU，或任意 EHT TB PPDU 中，要求 20 us。PE 提供额外的接收处理时间，以与 Data 字段相同的平均功率和相称的频谱发送。

cites.note: 36.3.4 EHT PPDU formats — two formats (EHT MU PPDU Fig 36-17 vs EHT TB PPDU Fig 36-18); EHT-SIG present only in MU; EHT-STF doubled in TB; Table 36-17 field list; pre-EHT vs EHT modulated fields
36.3.12.9 EHT-STF — purpose is AGC estimation in MIMO; positioned after EHT-SIG (MU) or U-SIG (TB); 0.8 us x 5 periods for MU, doubled for TB
36.3.12.10 EHT-LTF — MIMO channel estimation; P mapping matrix; single-stream pilots; number of EHT-LTFs vs spatial streams (Table 36-43)
36.3.13 Data field — carries PSDU(s); SERVICE field (Table 36-45); length-2047 PPDU-synchronous scrambler S(x)=x^11+x^9+1
36.3.14 Packet extension — PE duration 0/4/8/12/16/20 us; 20 us required for 4096-QAM / large-RU 320 MHz MU / EHT TB PPDU; provides extra RX processing time; same average power as Data field
